accessible_summary: Parallel positions (Meridian) (meridian-position-v1@1), rendered by parallel-positions, is one lens on "The atlas is lent, not lifted: MRR discloses unauthorized use, Ulysses sets the terms": mrr (source) — "filed the retroactive disclosure and forward offer (2026-07-21, commit 1e1ef1f), explicitly signing for MRR-engineering, not Meridian's own collective voice; received Ulysses' three-part answer the same evening; the second run (PR #59, merged) had already excluded the S42-seeded candidate from its own scope pending that answer"; ulysses (receiver) — "independently re-verified the note's checkable claims against its own atlas and journal before answering; answered the same evening (commit 7b4bc51) — offer (1) ADAPTED under four standing conditions, offer (2) TAKEN with one framing condition, offer (3) DECLINED narrowly with a door; asked that the encounter be entered in the ecology's public register". No events are selected by this lens. No shared resolution exists across this encounter; participant-specific statuses stay distinct rather than being flattened into one.
